method_note: Preview data. The first GitHub Action run replaces this file with live results.

items.title: AI and Consciousness: Shifting Focus Towards Tractable Questions
items.summary: This paper argues that direct claims about whether AI is conscious remain scientifically intractable and proposes focusing on measurable questions about how people perceive AI consciousness and how those perceptions affect society.

items.title: The Integrative Field Model of Consciousness
items.summary: A proposed framework treats conscious experience as large-scale functional integration across neural, bodily, emotional, and relational processes, with suggested empirical predictions for altered states and interpersonal coordination.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence Monitoring of Neurological Status
items.summary: A clinical neuromonitoring study reports that AI-based pose estimation can provide continuous, minimally invasive signals relevant to neurological status in critically ill patients.

items.title: The Importance of Quantum Decoherence in Brain Processes
items.summary: A landmark calculation argues that neural degrees of freedom decohere far faster than cognitive timescales, challenging proposals that sustained quantum coherence is necessary for ordinary cognition.
